description: Stabilization workflow activated when wellbeing signals indicate acute disruption, regression, or instability. Ensures rapid support, safety, and restoration of baseline functioning.

START.description: Workflow entry. Triggered by red/orange wellbeing signals, regression detection, or crisis indicators.

INITIAL_STABILITY_CHECK.description: Performs an immediate stability check to determine severity, urgency, and required stabilization actions.

ACTIVATE_STABILIZATION_PROTOCOL.description: Activates stabilization protocol including safety measures, essential needs support, and rapid interventions.

ASSESS_POST_STABILIZATION.description: Evaluates user condition after stabilization actions to determine next steps.

RESTORE_BASELINE_SUPPORT.description: Restores user to baseline support routines and prepares for follow-up monitoring.

ESCALATE_SUPPORT_PLAN.description: Escalates to a new or updated support plan if stabilization is insufficient.

COMPLETE_ESCALATION.description: Escalation completed. User routed to wellbeing.support-plan.

COMPLETE.description: Stabilization complete. User returned to baseline and ready for follow-up.

REJECT.description: Stabilization cannot proceed due to missing or invalid data
